creator: roam@ringlet.net
text:
On Fri, Aug 24, 2001 at 12:25:45PM -0400, The Anarcat wrote:
> 
> >Number:         30033
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       [Patch] maintainer update of port audio/ecasound
> >Originator:     The Anarcat
> >Release:        FreeBSD 4.4-RC i386
> >Organization:
> Nada, Inc
> >Environment:
> System: FreeBSD shall.anarcat.dyndns.org 4.4-RC FreeBSD 4.4-RC #4: Wed Aug 22 12:21:57 EDT 2001 anarcat@shall.anarcat.dyndns.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SHALL i386
> 
> >Description:
> 
> Update of the ecasound port. Now at version 2.0.2. The port seems to be a
> bit nicer and cleaner now. Still compiles cleanly out of the box (eg no
> patches necessary). A new port (ecawave) should logically follow shortly.
> 
> I had problems figuring out the python dependencies and pkg-plist
> hacking, so I simply disabled python support for now. If someone could
> give me a hand here, I just need to understand how to put "conditional"
> lines in pkg-plist.
> 
> >Fix:
[snip]
> 
> 
> Second, pkg-plist. I sorted the plist so there are a few "false
> positives" in there. Also note that this will croak under make package
> NOPORTDOCS=yes.
> 
> --- pkg-plist.orig      Thu Aug 23 19:03:11 2001
> +++ pkg-plist.sort      Fri Aug 24 12:16:14 2001
[snip]
>  lib/libkvutils.so
>  lib/libkvutils.so.2
> +share/doc/ecasound/ecasound-iam_manpage.html

As mentioned in my other mail, make this
%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/ecasound/ecasound-iam_manpage.html

After that, wait for a sound- and/or Python-aware committer to review
and commit this update :)  It looks good to me, but I cannot really
test it here..

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
This sentence no verb.
